subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! This is Thy servant who hath spent his days in heedlessness of Thy Beauty and remoteness from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک الذی قضی ایامه فی غفله عن جمالک و بعده عن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @twin Manifestations
